      // Filter out top-level strings (like 'name' and 'description') and the internal 'profile' prompt directive

    .replace(/&/g, "&")
    .replace(/"/g, """)
    .replace(/'/g, "'")
    .replace(/</g, "<")
    .replace(/>/g, ">")
    .replace(/\[/g, "[") // Optional: hardening against internal tagging
    .replace

      .map((v) => ({
        name: v.name,
        uri: v.voiceURI,
        lang: v.lang,
        localService: v.localService,
        default: v.default,
        region: this._getRegionLabel(v.lang),
        supportsParams: !v.name.includes("Natural"),
        _ref: v,
      }))
      .filter
